ui-ux.summary: Summary line shows N new/M rescanning; Rescan >> replaces Track >> for verified skills

edge-cases.summary: All rescans = just M rescanning; rejected lumped with new

architecture.summary: Discovery status carried via DiscoveredSkill interface; label from discovery, success from submission

integrations.summary: Pending skills handled by existing dedup; no backend changes needed

security.summary: Frontend-only change, no new data exposure

performance.summary: No performance impact - frontend-only label change, no additional API calls or data fetching
